features: SIGNATURE SCENT - Our Original scent will leave you feeling fresh and invigorated all day long. Packed with fresh citrus notes of apple and lemon, that combine with bergamot and sandalwood, helping you start every day the Rock Face way.
FAST ABSORBING - Leaving no stains, our Original body spray leaves you feeling fresh and ready to take on your day with long-lasting protection.
PIONEERING FORMULA - Hard-working and great-smelling pioneering formulas, backed by science. All our products are vegan-friendly, never tested on animals and free from micro-beads and parabens.
BUILT FOR ACTIVE LIFESTYLES - Designed for those with an active lifestyle in mind, this body spray deodorant is gentle on the skin with a long-lasting fragrance.

ROCK FACE - As a proudly independent British Brand and a team that has spent a lifetime in the industry, we wanted to deliver the highest quality formulas for men, at the most affordable price. There are real faces behind this brand.

NEW & IMPROVED spray nozzle. We heard you loud and clear and we’ve upgraded our deodorant cap with a stronger, more reliable nozzle that delivers an even mist every single time. No more clogs, no more surprises just an effortless spray.
description: Product Description Rock Face Active Body Spray will keep you fresh and invigorated all day long. Fling it in your gym bag and spray all over for an instant blast of the fresh citrus Rock Face fragrance. Use with Rock Face 48 hour deodorant. None of our products have been tested on animals Ingredients Butane, Alcohol Denat., Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Triethyl Citrate, Isopropyl Myristate, Limonene, Linalool Directions Shake can well. Spray from a distance of 20cm all over the body Safety Warning Pressurised container: may burst if heated. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50 degrees. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Keep out of reach of children. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Use only as directed. Avoid spraying in eyes. Do not apply to irritated or broken skin. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not use in confined areas. International misuse by deliberately concentrating and inhaling the contents can be harmful or fatal. See more
